title: cymbidium latifolium
intro: Cymbidium latifolium, also known as the Chinese Cymbidium, is a type of orchid plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cymbidium latifolium include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and easing breathing difficulties. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used in herbal supplements and capsules.
